prompt_text: Open source or affordable CRM tools instead of HubSpot
response:
# CRM Alternatives to HubSpot

## **Open Source (Free)**

| Tool | Best For | Key Features |
|------|----------|--------------|
| **Odoo** | Growing businesses | Modular, ERP + CRM, highly customizable |
| **SuiteCRM** | Enterprise users | Fork of SugarCRM, feature-rich |
| **EspoCRM** | Developers | Clean UI, REST API, flexible |
| **Crater** | Invoicing-heavy | Built on Laravel, modern stack |
| **Opencrx** | Complex workflows | Java-based, enterprise-grade |

## **Freemium/Low-Cost SaaS**

| Tool | Starting Price | Best For |
|------|-----------------|----------|
| **Zoho CRM** | Free tier available | Affordable all-in-one, good features |
| **Pipedrive** | $14-99/month | Sales pipeline focus, visual |
| **HubSpot (Free)** | Free tier | Limited but solid basics |
| **Agile CRM** | Free-$79/month | Small teams, automation |
| **Freshsales** | Free-$79/month | Support teams, lead scoring |
| **Capsule** | Free-$25/month | Simplicity, lightweight |

## **Budget-Friendly for Specific Needs**

- **Streak** (~$15/month) – Gmail-native CRM
- **Copper** (free-$119/month) – Google Workspace integration
- **Insightly** ($29-$99/month) – Project + CRM blend
- **Nimble** ($19-$99/month) – Social CRM focus

## **My Recommendation**

**Start with:** Zoho CRM (free tier) or Pipedrive (if sales-focused)  
**Self-hosted:** Odoo (if you can manage infrastructure)

What's your primary use case? That would help narrow it down further.
